violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. The small fryer for sushi kabar was not under a hood system.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Storage racks by the donut fryer in the bakery area need to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Foil pans for kuchen were being washed, rinsed , and sanitized to be re-used to make kuchen.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. The hand sink in the produce area was blocked by storage.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in the deli and bakery walk in freezers, kitchen, bakery, popcorn area, and storage room need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floors in the kitchen, deli, and sushi areas have missing and ripped flooring.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Sheet cake bases were stored on the floor in the cake decorating area.

Backflow prevention. — --Plumbing system was not installed to preclude backflow of a solid, liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply system. The prep sink in the deli area by the walk in cooler did not have a proper air gap. This sink must have an air gap to prevent backflow into this prep sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The frame around the door to the walk in freezer in the meat department walk in cooler is bare wood. This needs to be covered with a cleanable surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floors in the bakery, deli, and deli storage areas are missing sections, or torn. Missing ceiling tile in the bakery area around the oven. Broken tile in the cake decorating area.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under the cooking equipment in the deli need to be cleaned. Ceilings above the hot case need to be cleaned.
